difference: raws uses simple list format; AWS CLI uses man-page style with descriptions. Both list same operations.
AWS CLI: 'the following arguments are required: --target-distribution-id, --alias' (exit 252). raws: 'URI template variable TargetDistributionId not found' (exit 255).
AWS CLI does client-side validation: 'Missing required parameter DistributionConfig' (exit 252). raws sends to server and gets MalformedXML error (exit 254).
AWS CLI: 'the following arguments are required: --distribution-id' (exit 252). raws: 'URI template variable DistributionId not found' (exit 255). Different error format.
AWS CLI: 'the following arguments are required: --id' (exit 252). raws: 'URI template variable Id not found' (exit 255). Different error format.
AWS CLI: 'the following arguments are required: --id' (exit 252). raws: 'URI template variable Id not found' (exit 255). Different error message format and exit code.
AWS CLI returns empty output for empty list; raws returns full JSON structure with Marker/MaxItems/IsTruncated/Quantity.
AWS CLI returns empty output for empty distribution list; raws returns full JSON structure with Marker/MaxItems/IsTruncated/Quantity. Also text/table output differs accordingly.
raws includes extra MaxItems and Quantity fields in KeyValueStoreList that AWS CLI omits.
AWS CLI returns empty output for empty list; raws returns full JSON structure with Marker/MaxItems/IsTruncated/Quantity.
AWS CLI returns empty output for empty list; raws returns JSON with MaxItems/Quantity.
AWS CLI returns empty output for empty list; raws returns full JSON structure with Marker/MaxItems/IsTruncated/Quantity.
AWS CLI: client-side 'arguments are required: --resource' (exit 252). raws: server-side InvalidArgument error (exit 254).
sign is a custom AWS CLI command not in botocore model. raws reports 'Unknown operation'. Not implementable without custom code.
AWS CLI: client-side 'arguments are required: --resource, --tags' (exit 252). raws: server-side InvalidArgument error (exit 254).
Both recognize wait subcommand but error format differs. AWS: 'too few arguments' (exit 252). raws: 'Missing waiter name' (exit 2).
